summary: Tested two P0 features: 1) Truck Profile Edit Modal - React modal replaces window.prompt() for editing truck profile fields. 2) Verified Settings page loads with all 6 sections. Waypoint Arrived/Skip panel exists in code but requires active navigation with waypoints to test (complex setup).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: No window.prompt() calls exist in /app/components/ or /app/src/
VERIFIED: EditModal component in SettingsView.tsx (lines 162-264) with proper data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: data-testid='edit-modal-input' for number/text input fields
VERIFIED: data-testid='edit-modal-select' for dropdown select (Tunnel Category)
VERIFIED: Tunnel Category uses dropdown with options: NONE, A, B, C, D, E
VERIFIED: Waypoint Arrived/Skip panel code exists in NavigationView.tsx (lines 5455-5503) with data-testid='waypoint-action-panel', 'waypoint-arrived-btn', 'waypoint-skip-btn'

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Truck Profile Edit Modal fully functional: 1) Click Edit on any truck profile field opens React modal (not window.prompt). 2) Number fields show number input, Tunnel Category shows dropdown select with options NONE/A/B/C/D/E. 3) Save/Cancel/X buttons all work correctly. 4) Settings page has all 6 sections: Professional Routing, Units & Display, Truck Specifications, Safety Protocols, Interface & Audio, System & Data. 5) Waypoint Arrived/Skip panel exists in code but requires active navigation with waypoints to trigger (isDriving && waypoints.length > 0).

truck_profile_edit_modal_opens.details: Clicking Edit button opens modal with data-testid='truck-profile-edit-modal'

edit_modal_number_input.details: Height field shows input type='number', can type and save values

edit_modal_save_button.details: Save button (data-testid='edit-modal-save') closes modal and updates value

edit_modal_cancel_button.details: Cancel button (data-testid='edit-modal-cancel') closes modal without saving

tunnel_category_dropdown.details: Tunnel Category uses dropdown select (data-testid='edit-modal-select') with 6 options: NONE, A, B, C, D, E

settings_page_sections.details: All 6 sections visible: Professional Routing, Units & Display, Truck Specifications, Safety Protocols, Interface & Audio, System & Data

no_window_prompt.details: No window.prompt() calls found in /app/components/ or /app/src/

waypoint_panel_code_exists.details: Waypoint Arrived/Skip panel code exists in NavigationView.tsx with correct data-testid attributes. Panel shows when isDriving && waypoints.length > 0
